name: operations-kyc-pack
description: Operations and KYC workflows for document parsing, rules-grid evaluation, exception staging, and compliance review packets.
author: CoWork OS

skills.name: KYC Document Parsing
skills.description: Extract entity, ownership, identity, and document metadata from KYC packets.
skills.prompt: Parse KYC documents from provided files. Extract entity names, jurisdictions, registration IDs, beneficial owners, addresses, document dates, expiry dates, sanctions/PEP notes if sourced, missing documents, and confidence per field. Preserve source references for every extraction.

skills.name: KYC Rules Grid
skills.description: Evaluate extracted KYC facts against a configured rules grid.
skills.prompt: Evaluate KYC facts against the provided rules grid. Return pass/fail/needs-review per rule, source support, missing evidence, exception severity, and questions for compliance. Do not approve onboarding or provide legal advice.

slashCommands.name: kyc-rules
slashCommands.description: Evaluate KYC facts against a rules grid
